metadata.description: Actian Design System 2026 toolkit — sync tokens and guidelines from Figma, generate wireframe flows, create component briefs, audit designs, compare flows, fix findings, and build presentations. 115 tokens (3 themes), WCAG 2.1 AA, 29 FM Kit components, 77 DS2026 component sets.
